claim_boundary: Open-development sequence-only approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, frozen-test evidence, or formal validation.

decision.reason: Only branch with consistent three-seed same-panel gains in Rdual rho, all three early-enrichment budgets, and within-parent EF.
decision.ridge_role: Diversity/disagreement challengers; do not naively average.
decision.snapshot_boundary: Current active V29 open +504 snapshot, not fit>=4000 or terminal.

method.D0: Immutable D0 seed models trained on 2977 rows were replayed read-only on the exact D1 160-row open-development panel.
method.D1: Immutable D1 predictions from models trained on 3398 rows were recomputed on that same panel.
method.delta_sign: D1-D0; positive better for rho/recall/EF, negative better for MAE/RMSE.
